kinesis.stream.streamencryption.Encrypti.Description: The encryption type to use. The only valid value is `KMS`.

kinesis.stream.streamencryption.KeyId.Description: The GUID for the customer-managed AWS KMS key to use for encryption. This value can be a globally unique identifier, a fully specified Amazon Resource Name (ARN) to either an alias or a key, or an alias name prefixed by "alias/".You can also use a master key owned by Kinesis Data Streams by specifying the alias `aws/kinesis`.  + Key ARN example: `arn:aws:kms:us-east-1:123456789012:key/12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012` + Alias ARN example: `arn:aws:kms:us-east-1:123456789012:alias/MyAliasName` + Globally unique key ID example: `12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012` + Alias name example: `alias/MyAliasName` + Master key owned by Kinesis Data Streams: `alias/aws/kinesis`
